  "findings": [
    "No electrical service disconnect within sight of the outdoor condenser/heat pump unit."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a compliant, weatherproof electrical disconnect switch within sight of and readily accessible from the outdoor unit."
  ],
  "rationale": "National Electrical Code (NEC 440.14) and local mechanical codes (IMC/IRC) require an electrical disconnect to be located within sight of and readily accessible from the air-conditioning or refrigerating equipment. The absence of a visible disconnect is a major safety hazard for servicing technicians.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 440.14",
    "IMC Section 307",
    "IRC Section M1401"
  ]
}
